stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to second baseman Edwin Arroyo to first baseman Spencer Steer. Adley Rutschman to 3rd. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, third baseman Casey Schmitt to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Hunter Goodman scores. TJ Rumfield out at 3rd. Cole Carrigg to 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Romy Gonzalez to first baseman Willson Contreras. Vaughn Grissom out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.
